name: visualize-local
description: Create theme-aware temporary HTML visualizations and return named local file links.

interface.shortDescription: Theme-aware HTML visualizations as local file links.
interface.longDescription: Visualize Local creates self-contained theme-aware HTML demos, explainers, calculators, dashboards, and slide-style interactions in a private hidden directory under the system temp folder, then returns a named Markdown link to the generated file.
defaultPrompt: Use $visualize-local to create an interactive calculator demo.
Use $visualize-local to visualize Conway's Game of Life.
